indicator 1 ('adjustment indicator' derived from the presence of query code values noted below 
on any of the claim records included in the analysis): 

0 = No adjustment (no query code = 0 or 5) 
1 = Credit adjustment (query code = 0) 
2 = Debit adjustment (query code = 5) 
3 = Credit and debit adjustment (both query code = 0 and 5) 

Warning indicator 2 ('error condition' derived from checking the edit code trailer on the final action 
claims(s) that comprise the stay): 

0 = No error 
1 =
